scene_summary: A spare cream paper field with faint marginal type columns, tiny colored apertures, pinholes, and two torn folded paper shards. The strongest source surfaces are the large upper-right folded triangular shard and the lower-left layered media fragment; smaller source anchors appear as colored slits, chips, a black pinhole, and pale paper repairs.
usable_surfaces: upper-right folded triangular paper shard with green-black underlayer
lower-left torn layered media shard with blue, ochre, and red panes
left and right faded marginal type columns
small orange torn slit near upper-left
small blue torn slit near upper-center
black pinhole aperture on upper-right field
small cyan square aperture near lower-center
pale triangular repair patch right of center

detected_objects.label: retro-index-hero-slip
detected_objects.visual_evidence: large suspended folded paper shard in the upper-right; its torn cream face exposes a green and black image-like underlayer along the right edge, making it the dominant tilted media slip.

detected_objects.label: living-itinerary-hero-island
detected_objects.visual_evidence: lower-left floating torn shard with layered colored panes and a pale sail-like paper edge; reads as a restrained island/world fragment rather than a card.

detected_objects.label: typelit-book-page-cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: faded vertical marginal band on the far left containing ghosted rows of unreadable type-like marks and pale page texture.

detected_objects.label: nityas-leisure-column
detected_objects.visual_evidence: right-side dissolved margin column with repeated faint numeric/type ticks running down the edge, atmospheric rather than readable.

detected_objects.label: cod-recipe-glint
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is mostly negative cream field with two dominant folded shards, faint margin text, and a few precise colored apertures; source marks are legible without becoming a grid or clutter.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
